Meaning.En: to print again, especially a book or newspaper after the first edition has sold out
Meaning.Example: The publisher decided to reprint the bestseller due to high demand.

Situation.Vi: Ấn bản ban đầu đã bán hết, nhà xuất bản quyết định in thêm.
Situation.En: The initial print run sold out, so the publisher decided to print more copies.

Meaning.Vi: bản in lại, bản tái bản
Meaning.En: a copy of a book, newspaper, or other printed material that has been printed again after the first edition
Meaning.Example: This is a later reprint of the 1950s classic, with a new introduction.

Situation.Vi: Tôi mua một bản in lại có bìa mới của cuốn tiểu thuyết cũ.
Situation.En: I bought a new-cover reprint of the old novel.
